_comment: Token watchlists for TheProtocoMind. Core = primary coverage. Rotating = exploratory. Breakout = dynamic, populated by performanceEngine and market signals.

rules.core: Gets coverage in every market insight and technical analysis tweet. Always included in fundamental analysis rotation.
rules.rotating: Gets 2-3 mentions per week. Rotates based on narrative strength and volume activity.
rules.breakout: Populated dynamically when a token shows: volume spike >2x avg, unusual price momentum, or narrative spike in CT. Auto-clears after 72h unless manually retained.
